text:
is an artbook published by Kadokawa on 10 April 2015.

Overview

Book focused on Kaworu Nagisa, with illustrations, scenes and products themed after him. It was released on 10 April 2015 (Shito's Day!!), the 20th anniversary of "Neon Genesis Evangelion".

The cover is drawn by popular animator Akemi Hayashi. It had with an extra-large B2 poster of the same illustration.
